name: Block Escape 2
description: Tap Out: Block Escape is a relaxing 3D puzzle game where your goal is to clear all blocks from the structure. Each block can only move in the direction shown on it, so you must think carefully and find the correct order. Rotate the puzzle, zoom in, and inspect every angle to discover hidden moves and solve challenging levels. Easy to learn, satisfying to play, and perfect for relaxing puzzle sessions.
instructions: HOW TO PLAY Left Mouse Button Click rarr Push Remove Blocks Left Mouse Button Drag rarr Rotate Camera Middle Mouse Button rarr Pan Camera Mouse Wheel rarr Zoom In Out
